exception.message: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: Expected browser binary location, but unable to find binary in default location, no 'moz:firefoxOptions.binary' capability provided, and no binary flag set on the command line Host info: host: 'NARESHR', ip: '192.168.0.5' Build info: version: '4.15.0', revision: '1d14b5521b' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.10' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.firefox.FirefoxDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: true, browserName: firefox, moz:debuggerAddress: true, moz:firefoxOptions: {}}]}]
